HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Anne Cliatt defendant in propria persona

NO APPEARANCE. Tentative ruling adopted after hearing. The claim of exemption is granted except for $150 per pay period. Any funds withheld are ordered released to the judgment creditor. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
